name: smms-security-scan
description: Automated security scanning for SMMS application

scripts.security:scan: npm run security:dependencies && npm run security:code && npm run security:secrets
scripts.security:code: npm run lint && npx eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx && npx semgrep --config=auto .
scripts.security:csp: npx csp-evaluator https://mtusmms.me || echo 'CSP evaluation failed - site may be down'
scripts.security:all: npm run security:scan && npm run security:csp && npm run security:headers && npm run security:ssl
